title: BEM-866 script step before commit
objective:
Run script:
"""
p = Path('.github/workflows/codex-runner.yml')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
# Remove older duplicate queue steps by name to avoid malformed workflow.
remove_names = ['Process workflow dispatch queue before commit', 'Process workflow dispatch queue via github-script', 'Process workflow dispatch queue minimal', 'Process workflow dispatch queue']
lines = text.splitlines()
out = []
i = 0
while i < len(lines):
    line = lines[i]
    if any(('- name: ' + name) in line for name in remove_names):
        indent = len(line) - len(line.lstrip(' '))
        i += 1
        while i < len(lines):
            nxt = lines[i]
            nindent = len(nxt) - len(nxt.lstrip(' '))
            if nxt.lstrip().startswith('- name:') and nindent == indent:
                break
            i += 1
        continue
    out.append(line)
    i += 1
text = '\n'.join(out) + '\n'
step = '''\n      - name: Process workflow dispatch queue before commit\n        if: always()\n        env:\n          GH_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.AI_SYSTEM_GITHUB_PAT }}\n        run: |\n          python3 scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py\n\n'''
anchor = '      - name: Commit and push everything\n'
if anchor in text:
    text = text.replace(anchor, step + anchor)
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
marker = Path('governance/runtime/curator_dispatch/BEM866_SCRIPT_STEP_BEFORE_COMMIT.md')
marker.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
marker.write_text('# BEM-866 script step before commit\nStatus: PATCHED\nScript: scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.py\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
changed_files.append(str(marker))
ops_applied.append('added script-call queue processor step before commit')
"""
No issue comments.
